text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for an initial term of one (1) year, automatically renewing for successive one-year terms unless either party provides sixty (60) days' notice of non-renewal.
This Agreement has no defined term or renewal mechanism.
Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon sixty (60) days' notice of non-renewal delivered in writing to the other party.
This Agreement may be terminated at any time without prior notice.
Upon written request by either party, the parties may reinstate this Agreement following termination without executing a new agreement.
note: Positive example here means the risk pattern is present in the text, not that the clause is good drafting.

text: Termination of this Agreement is final; any resumption of the relationship shall require execution of a new agreement between the parties.
